sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: did not change the Roman Catholic Church doctrine regarding the LGBTQ+ community - but made overtures in a decree in 2023.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: “made overtures” is interpretive language implying conciliatory intent rather than neutrally describing the policy action.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: These included allowing priests to bless same-sex couples - a move that angered conservatives Catholics, notably in Africa.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Asserts widespread anger, especially in Africa, without sourcing or specific evidence to support the scope of the claim.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: Francis DeBernardo, executive director of New Ways Ministry, was quoted as saying by the National Catholic Reporter website.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Only quotes an LGBTQ advocacy voice while referencing conservative opposition; omits perspectives from conservatives or Vatican officials responding to the pilgrimage.
